alternative_parents.description: Aromatic compounds that contain a phenol ether, which carries an amine group on the benzene ring.
alternative_parents.name: Aminophenyl ethers

alternative_parents.description: Aromatic compounds contaning a phenoxy group.
alternative_parents.name: Phenoxy compounds

alternative_parents.description: Aliphatic aromatic amines in which the amino group is linked to two aliphatic chains and one aromatic group.
alternative_parents.name: Dialkylarylamines

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing an aminobenzene moiety.
alternative_parents.name: Aniline and substituted anilines

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing the alkyl aryl ether functional group with the generic formula R-O-R' , where R is an alkyl group and R' is an aryl group.
alternative_parents.name: Alkyl aryl ethers

alternative_parents.description: Compounds containing a sulfonyl group( which as the general structure RS(=O)2R' (R,R' =alkyl, aryl)) attached to two carbon atoms.
alternative_parents.name: Sulfones

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing an heterocycle with at least one nitrogen atom and one carbon atom linked to each other.
alternative_parents.name: Azacyclic compounds

alternative_parents.description: Compounds containing a bond between carbon a pnictogen atom. Pnictogens are p-block element atoms that are in the group 15 of the periodic table.
alternative_parents.name: Organopnictogen compounds

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing an oxide group.
alternative_parents.name: Organic oxides

alternative_parents.description: Derivatives of hydrocarbons obtained by substituting one or more carbon atoms by an heteroatom. They contain at least one carbon atom and heteroatom.
alternative_parents.name: Hydrocarbon derivatives

class.description: Heterocyclic compounds containing a saturated six-member ring with four carbon atoms, one sulfur atom, and one nitrogen.
class.name: Thiazinanes

description: This compound belongs to the class of organic compounds known as phenylthiomorpholines. These are compounds containing a thiomorpholine ring conjugated to a phenyl group. Thiomorpholine a six-membered aliphatic ring containing one nitrogen atom and one sulfur atom at positions 1 and 4 respectively, and four carbon atoms.

direct_parent.description: Compounds containing a thiomorpholine ring conjugated to a phenyl group. Thiomorpholine a six-membered aliphatic ring containing one nitrogen atom and one sulfur atom at positions 1 and 4 respectively, and four carbon atoms.
direct_parent.name: Phenylthiomorpholines

kingdom.description: Compounds that contain at least one carbon atom, excluding isocyanide/cyanide and their non-hydrocarbyl derivatives, thiophosgene, carbon diselenide, carbon monosulfide, carbon disulfide, carbon subsulfide, carbon monoxide, carbon dioxide, Carbon suboxide, and dicarbon monoxide.
kingdom.name: Organic compounds

subclass.description: Heterocyclic compounds containing a thiomorpholine ring, which is a six-membered aliphatic ring containing one nitrogen atom and one sulfur atom at positions 1 and 4 respectively, and four carbon atoms.
subclass.name: Thiomorpholines

superclass.description: Compounds containing a ring with least one carbon atom and one non-carbon atom.
superclass.name: Organoheterocyclic compounds
